heading: Fields
body:
| Field    | Type     | Required? | Description                                                                                                                    |
| -------- | -------- | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| facets   | document | yes       | Information for bucketing the data for each facet. You must specify at least one Facet Definition.                             |
| operator | document | no        | Operator to use to perform the facet over. If omitted, MongoDB Search performs the facet over all documents in the collection. |
